name: Plant
description:
This is one heck of a plant

You were trudging through the swamp as an adventurer like you does, coming across many a strange and wild beast and plant, but nothing was like what sits in front of you now.

This strange plant has a smooth green stem, a few large leaves, and at the top, a red 'head'. On the plant's 'face' is a mouth, it's lips white, soft, big, and puffy, alongside a tongue, slick and wet. The plant seems to lack teeth, and cannot actually bite anything.

This plant by itself will suck on anything, in hopes of finding nutrients of any kind, and clearly this tactic has allowed it to grow till this very day, seems like Charles Darwin himself has blessed this plant to traverse through the cycle of life, and evolve into whatever the hell this is.

Now before you even ask...

Yes, it will suck your dick.

(Or pussy if you're a gal who somehow stumbled upon this unforgivable sight)

Furthermore the fluids that are released by your reproductive organs does count as nutrients the plant can use to grow. So in theory, this plant can literally live off of your cum.
